title: Creamy Garlic Syrian Stir-fry
description: A romantic and flavorful dish featuring a creamy garlic salsa with pescatarian-friendly options.

ingredients.name: Garlic cloves
ingredients.notes: For best flavor, use fresh garlic

ingredients.name: Tomato sauce
ingredients.notes: Any mild tomato-based sauce can be used

ingredients.name: Watercress or spinach (optional)
ingredients.notes: To add freshness and texture, if preferred

instructions: Heat a pan with olive oil over medium heat.
Add minced garlic and cook until fragrant but not browned.
Stir in tomato sauce and red pepper flakes (if using).
Reduce the mixture to a thick consistency by simmering for about 5 minutes.
Fold in Greek yogurt or coconut cream while stirring continuously.
Let cool slightly before serving. Add fresh watercress or spinach if desired.
Garnish with parsley or cilantro leaves.
